title: Guided and Research Workflows
objective: Connect a P007-ready corpus to the validated P006 stylo engine through beginner-first, versioned, hash-bound, review-before-run workflows that require no user-written R, Python, or shell code while preserving parameter visibility, unknown isolation, one-time admission, typed partial failure, and later-ticket claim boundaries.
scope: A closed resolved-workflow-config-v1 contract with canonical serialization, SHA-256 binding, strict parsing, and a 24-cell public ceiling
The accepted guided-grid-v1 whole-text profile with 100, 300, 500, and 1000 MFW; zero-percent culling; Classic Delta; and a non-optimal 500-MFW reference
Explicit transductive_exploratory and unknown_holdout analysis-scope labels with known-only fitting invariants
Review-before-run presentation of all requested cells, corpus-supported availability, fixed reference, cell count, and content-free configuration digest
Single-use P007 READY consumption through the existing atomic admission transaction with no lower-level public bypass or silent parameter downgrade
Server-side claim, execution, P006 validation, durable result persistence, guardian acknowledgement, status, cancellation, retry, and partial-cell behavior
Beginner-first English Parameters and Run surfaces with keyboard, reflow, semantic-table, and honest-boundary checks
A visibly locked Research Mode until the exact versioned research-grid-v1 preset receives human method acceptance
Real upload-to-run browser evidence for the exposed minimum-alpha workflow and later all-three-purpose P008 completion evidence
Content-free provenance, exact-commit clean-clone, Linux CI, supply-chain, and canonical-container evidence
non_goals: Open-ended sliders, arbitrary parameter search, post-result cell selection, or calling the 500-MFW reference a best setting
Inventing unresolved culling, segmentation, calibration, threshold, or Research preset values to meet the alpha date
Changing the frozen P006 worker wire schema or reimplementing Delta mathematics in Python or Streamlit
Result interpretation graphics, nearest-neighbour explanation, dendrogram, PCA, MDS, or result downloads owned by P009
Benchmark accuracy, negative controls, leakage validation, or calibration owned by P010 and P011
A complete FAIR-oriented run package, clean rerun, reproducibility claim, or archival release owned by P012 and P015
Pinocchio or any literary case-study result owned by P013
Production deployment, host isolation, load, rollback, or Lemmata coexistence evidence owned by P014
Authorship proof, confidence, causal stylistic change, general usability, teachability, scientific validation, FAIR certification, or publication-readiness claims

acceptance.criterion: Human-owned records accept the exposed Guided parameter values, the bounded alpha sequence, and the deferred integrated owner walkthrough while unresolved Research-grid choices remain explicitly locked.

A closed resolved workflow configuration rejects malformed, duplicate-key, non-finite, unknown-field, unsupported, reordered, inconsistent, oversized, or more-than-24-cell inputs and produces deterministic canonical JSON and SHA-256.
The four-cell Guided profile resolves exactly 100, 300, 500, and 1000 MFW with zero-percent culling, whole text, Classic Delta, seed 20260713, and a 500-MFW reference that is never described as best.

All-known runs are labelled transductive_exploratory; declared unknowns are excluded from every known-derived fitting and selection artifact and are labelled unknown_holdout without confidence or authorship language.

Only the reviewed immutable configuration and an unexpired one-time hash-consistent P007 READY authority can write exact P006 input and enqueue; corpus, role, config, request, expiry, reuse, concurrency, and lower-level bypass attacks fail closed.

A queued public job is claimed and run by the real P006 boundary; complete, partial, failed, cancellation-requested, cancelled, saturated, expired, and guardian-unconfirmed states remain distinct and content-free.

Parameters and review-before-run explain MFW, culling, whole text, Delta, cell availability, fixed reference, analysis scope, workload, and method limits in beginner-first English with semantic-table and accessible mobile/keyboard parity.
Research Mode cannot accept arbitrary controls, remains unavailable until the exact research-grid-v1 is human-accepted, and can never exceed 24 versioned and hash-bound public cells.

The minimum alpha workflow completes real upload-to-validated-P006-result browser E2E without user-written code or shell; full P008 later repeats the gate for all three research purposes and relevant known/unknown scopes.

Full source, schema, provenance, privacy-canary, adversarial workflow, exact-commit clean-clone, Linux CI, SBOM/dependency/secret, canonical-container, and claim-boundary gates pass at full measured coverage.

changed_files: P008 opening prompt, accepted minimum-alpha workflow contract, deferred-owner-walkthrough ADR, native Ticket, PromptEvent, HumanDecision, and start checkpoint
blockers: Full P008 completion requires a separate human decision for the exact research-grid-v1 culling and any future segmentation values; this does not block the four-cell Guided public-alpha slice.
Public-alpha activation still requires the carried P007 AC-09 owner walkthrough plus minimum P009 and P014 gates.
